prompt:
A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 1 — The Leader.
A majestic lion-like creature with a golden mane made of flames, wearing a small golden crown. Standing confidently on a rocky peak. Fiery, bold energy. Powerful stance, determined eyes.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with twinkling stars and nebula wisps.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "1 — 領袖"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, vibrant colors, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 2 — The Diplomat.
A graceful moon-rabbit creature with luminous silver-blue fur and long flowing ears that shimmer like moonlight. Gentle, peaceful expression. Holding a small glowing orb of balance between its paws.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with a crescent moon and twinkling stars.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "2 — 外交家"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, soft colors, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 3 — The Communicator.
A vibrant, colorful bird-like creature with rainbow-gradient plumage and a cheerful expression. Musical notes and sparkles float around it. Wings spread joyfully.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with colorful nebula swirls and stars.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "3 — 表達者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, vivid colors, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 4 — The Builder.
A sturdy bear-golem creature with earth-brown and emerald stone armor plates. Strong, reliable stance. Small glowing green crystal on its forehead. Holding a miniature golden building block.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with stars and faint geometric patterns.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "4 — 建造者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, earthy tones, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 5 — The Freedom Seeker.
A sleek winged fox-like creature with turquoise and silver fur, soaring through the sky with wind trails. Dynamic flying pose, adventurous expression. Feathered tail streaming behind.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with shooting stars and aurora borealis wisps.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "5 — 自由者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, dynamic colors, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 6 — The Nurturer.
A gentle deer-like creature with rose-pink and cream fur. Small cherry blossom flowers growing from its antlers. Warm, caring expression. A soft heart-shaped glow on its chest.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with gentle pink nebula and stars.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "6 — 照顧者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, warm pastel tones, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 7 — The Seeker.
A wise owl-like creature with deep purple and silver feathers. A glowing third eye on its forehead. Surrounded by floating ancient runes and tiny orbiting books. Contemplative, mysterious aura.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with swirling galaxy and bright stars.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "7 — 探索者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, mystical tones, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 8 — The Powerhouse.
A powerful dragon-like creature with black and gold scales. An infinity symbol (∞) glowing on its chest. Coiled around a pile of glowing crystals and gems. Commanding, authoritative presence.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with golden nebula streaks and stars.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "8 — 權威者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, bold dark-gold tones, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Life Path Number 9 — The Humanitarian.
A phoenix-like creature with gradient wings from red to gold to white. Spreading its wings wide, emitting warm golden light rays. Compassionate, wise eyes. Small creatures gather below it.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with warm golden nebula and stars.
Gold decorative circular frame around the character.
At the bottom, text: "9 — 博愛者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, warm radiant tones, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Master Number 11 — The Illuminator.
An ethereal twin-tailed celestial fox with pure white and silver fur, glowing with inner light. Its two tails form the number 11. Bright glowing eyes radiating spiritual energy. Lightning-like aura.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with intense starfield and light beams.
Gold decorative circular frame with a special 'Master Number' star emblem.
At the bottom, text: "11 — 啟示者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, luminous ethereal tones, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Master Number 22 — The Master Builder.
A colossal cosmic turtle creature with a miniature golden city/temple built on its shell. Earth and star elements merged in its design. Powerful yet wise appearance. Glowing gold and earth-brown tones.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with planetary rings and bright stars.
Gold decorative circular frame with a special 'Master Number' star emblem.
At the bottom, text: "22 — 大建築師"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, grand majestic tones, high quality.

A single Pokémon-style creature representing Master Number 33 — The Master Healer.
A majestic unicorn-like creature with a crystal horn that emits healing rainbow light. Indigo and rose-colored flowing mane. Surrounded by healing energy orbs. Serene, unconditionally loving expression.
Background: deep cosmic purple-black gradient with soft healing light and stars.
Gold decorative circular frame with a special 'Master Number' star emblem.
At the bottom, text: "33 — 大療癒者"
Square 1:1 composition, centered, digital illustration, soft healing tones, high quality.
